description.ko: 빛을 내뿜는 맥동하는 유기적 호흡 구조를 통해 생명의 흐름을 심도 있게 탐구합니다.
description.en: A deep exploration of organic life through a pulsating, bioluminescent respiratory structure that breathes light.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, depicting a massive respiratory organism of translucent #7FB069 emerald moss and #2D5A3D vascular membranes. The entity floats in a silent #E6F2E1 pearlescent haze, rhythmically exhaling #FFE66D golden bioluminescent spores that move like slow-motion liquid silk. Macro focus on the interconnected organic veins and the undulating fluid membranes. Octane render, 8k, volumetric light shafts, serene divine atmosphere, hyper-realistic fluid dynamics.
